data.title: Data breach at The Phia Group in July 2024 exposed personal info. Incident discovered on July 9, 2024.
data.description: In Canton, Massachusetts, on January 28, 2026, The Phia Group reported a potential data security breach involving personal information. The incident took place between July 8 and July 9, 2024. It was discovered on July 9, 2024.

data.title: Demand for personalized skincare rising - Laser by Aleya caters to Gen Z, millennial clients seeking smarter, simpler solutions.
data.description: In a recent press release dated January 28, 2026, located in Great Neck, NY, Laser by Aleya announced its decision to broaden its consultation services in response to the growing demand for customized skincare solutions. This move reflects a trend where an increasing number of clients prefer tailored and low-maintenance skincare approaches. The company is observing heightened interest from both Generation Z and millennial clients, signaling a shift towards more personalized skincare routines.

data.title: Hawthorn Bancshares reports Q4 net income of $6.2M ($0.90/share) and $23.8M ($3.43/share) for 2025.
data.description: In Jefferson City, Missouri, on January 28, 2026, Hawthorn Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: HWBK), the parent company of Hawthorn Bank, announced its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The Company reported a net income of $6.2 million for the quarter, translating to earnings per diluted share (EPS) of $0.90. For the entire year ending on December 31, 2025, Hawthorn Bancshares reported a net income of $23.8 million, resulting in an EPS of $3.43.

data.title: Pearl Diver Credit Company Inc. announces a $0.22 monthly dividend per share for February, March, April, etc.
data.description: Pearl Diver Credit Company Inc. (NYSE: PDCC, PDPA) headquartered in New York and London, declared a regular monthly dividend for the upcoming months. The Board of Directors approved a dividend of $0.22 per share on the Company's common stock. This dividend applies to shareholders for the months of February, March, April, and more to follow.

data.title: WM reports Q4 revenue of $6.3 billion, up from $5.9 billion in Q4 2024, and full-year revenue of $25 billion.
data.description: WM (NYSE: WM) revealed their financial outcomes for the periods ending December 31, 2025. In the fourth quarter, revenue stood at $6.313 billion, demonstrating growth compared to $5.893 billion in the same quarter of the previous year. For the full year ending December 31, 2025, revenue reached $25 million. Please note that all figures are presented in millions unless specified otherwise.

data.title: Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. (NYSE: AESI) will release Q4 & Year End 2025 earnings on Feb 23, 2026, followed by conference call on Feb 24, 2026 at 9am CT (10am ET). Webcast link: https://ir.atlas.energy/.
data.description: Atlas Energy Solutions Inc. (NYSE: AESI) based in Austin, Texas, will release its fourth quarter and year-end 2025 earnings after the market closes on Monday, February 23, 2026. A conference call to discuss financial and operational results will be held at 9:00am Central Time (10:00am Eastern Time) on Tuesday, February 24, 2026. A live webcast can be accessed at https://ir.atlas.energy/. Participants are encouraged to join the webcast at least 10 minutes prior to the start time.

data.title: Meta stock rises on Q4 earnings beat with $59.89B revenue, $8.88 EPS, 24% YoY revenue growth, 7% DAUs increase, 18% ad impressions rise and 40% expenses surge.
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc (NASDAQ: META) released their Q4 financial results after the market closed on Wednesday. They reported revenue of $59.89 billion, surpassing analyst predictions of $58.30 billion. Adjusted earnings were $8.88 per share, exceeding estimates of $8.16 per share. Total revenue saw a 24% increase compared to the previous year. Family daily active users grew by 7% year-over-year to reach 3.58 billion. Ad impressions rose by 18% year-over-year, with the average price per ad increasing by 6%. The operating margin was 41%, lower than the 48% from the same quarter in the prior year. Costs and expenses went up by 40% year-over-year to $35.15 billion. The Meta Platforms stock is currently trading in a narrow range. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Southwest Airlines (NYSE: LUV) stock rises post Q4 earnings despite missing street revenue estimate of $7.50B, reporting $7.44B, with record passenger revenue of $6.8B, up by 7.6% year-over-year.
data.description: Southwest Airlines Company, a leading airline operator listed as LUV on the NYSE, released its fourth-quarter financial results post-market close on Wednesday. The company experienced a mixed outcome, with its revenue for the fourth quarter reaching $7.44 billion, displaying a 7.4% increase compared to the previous year. Notably, this revenue figure fell short of the $7.50 billion estimate as per data from Benzinga Pro. Specifically, Southwest Airlines recorded a fourth-quarter passenger revenue of $6.8 billion, marking a 7.6% rise from the same period in the prior year. The company achieved record levels in both overall revenue and passenger revenue for the fourth quarter. Consequently, Southwest Airlines stock is presently trading at elevated levels, exhibiting strong upward momentum post the financial release.

data.title: NuVista Energy Ltd. and Ovintiv Inc. receive Investment Canada Act approval for proposed acquisition.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on January 28, 2026, NuVista Energy Ltd. (TSX: NVA) and Ovintiv Inc. (NYSE: OVV) (TSX: OVV) revealed that the Government of Canada has given the go-ahead for the planned acquisition of NuVista by Ovintiv. This significant development involves transactions between the two companies, marking a noteworthy step in the energy sector.

data.title: US officials to meet with banks and crypto firms as they resume talks on CLARITY. They aim to address legislation amid disagreement on stablecoin yield.
data.description: The current administration led by President Donald Trump in the United States is aiming to resolve a standstill concerning legislation related to the structure of the cryptocurrency market. Lawmakers are facing disagreement specifically regarding the regulation of stablecoin yield, causing divisions and hindering progress on the issue.

data.title: SBVWCD unveils revamped website at sbvwcd.org reflecting commitment to science of stewardship.
data.description: In Redlands, California, on January 28, 2026, the San Bernardino Valley Water Conservation District (SBVWCD) unveiled its updated website, sbvwcd.org. The site reflects the Board of Directors' commitment to focused decision-making and transparency to the public. The district aims to enhance communication with stakeholders and raise awareness about water conservation efforts. The website features detailed information about ongoing projects, upcoming initiatives, and ways for the community to participate in water conservation. The SBVWCD encourages residents to visit the website to stay informed and engage in sustainable practices.

data.title: Las Vegas Sands stock drops despite Q4 revenue of $3.649B, EPS beat at 85 cents vs 76 cents, property EBITDA rose to $1.41B.
data.description: Las Vegas Sands Corp (NYSE: LVS) exceeded analyst expectations with their fourth-quarter financial results announced after the market closed. The company reported fourth-quarter revenue of $3.649 billion, surpassing the consensus estimate of $3.328 billion. Their adjusted earnings per share were 85 cents, beating the consensus estimate of 76 cents per share. Additionally, their adjusted property EBITDA rose to $1.41 billion from $1.1 billion in the previous year's fourth quarter. This positive performance contrasts with Las Vegas Sands stock dropping, and more details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Backblaze named finalist in 2026 Tech Innovation CUBEd Awards for Most Innovative Data Storage. $BLZE delivers up to 1Tbps of sustained throughput.
data.description: In San Mateo, California, Backblaze, Inc. (Nasdaq: BLZE) has been selected as a finalist for the Most Innovative Data Storage Solution at the 2026 Tech Innovation CUBEd Awards by SiliconANGLE Media. The company's B2 Overdrive is transforming cloud object storage by removing the typical cost-performance trade-off. Offering unparalleled value, it achieves up to 1Tbps of sustained throughput, cementing its position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: ServiceNow beats Q4 estimates with $3.57B revenue, 92 cents EPS. Revenue up 20.5% YoY. Subscription revenue up 21%.
data.description: ServiceNow Inc (NYSE: NOW) released its fourth-quarter financial results, surpassing analyst expectations. The software company reported a revenue of around $3.57 billion, exceeding the consensus estimate of $3.53 billion. Their adjusted earnings for the quarter were 92 cents per share, higher than the anticipated 88 cents per share. Total revenue saw a 20.5% increase year-over-year, with Subscription revenue growing by 21%. ServiceNow disclosed remaining performance obligations of $28.2 billion at the end of the quarter, representing a 26.5% increase from the previous year. Furthermore, the company noted a rise in customers with over $5 million in annual contract value. ServiceNow stock is currently on an upward trend following these positive results. For the complete article, please visit the original source.
